operator_inputs_required: identification of the relevant AI system and version covered by the declaration
conformity statement and references to the applicable Union harmonisation legislation
references to harmonised standards, common specifications, and notified-body information where applicable
date, place, name, and signature of the person empowered to sign for the provider

declaration_content_items.title: Provider name and address or other contact details
operator_inputs_required: enter the provider's formal identification and contact details exactly as used in the declaration

declaration_content_items.title: Identification of the AI system covered by the declaration
operator_inputs_required: identify the relevant AI system, version, and other identifiers covered by the declaration

declaration_content_items.title: Statement that the declaration is issued under the sole responsibility of the provider
operator_inputs_required: complete the provider responsibility statement used in the final declaration

declaration_content_items.title: References to harmonised standards or common specifications applied
operator_inputs_required: record the standards, specifications, or other references relied on for conformity

declaration_content_items.title: Notified body and conformity assessment procedure information where applicable
operator_inputs_required: record the procedure used and any notified-body identity and certificate references where applicable

declaration_content_items.title: Date, place, name, function, and signature
operator_inputs_required: record the date, place, signatory name, signatory function, and signature details
